description: Removes or reduces the movement speed penalty when using items (eating, blocking, bow pulling). Multiple bypass modes for different anti-cheats.

fields.tick: int - counter incremented each onPreMotion call while using item, reset to 0 when not using
fields.blinking: boolean - whether blink packet queue is active (Alpha mode)
fields.rotated: boolean - set true when Beta mode rotates head away (used in onPreInput to suppress jump)

settings.name: Mode
settings.description: Bypass method for the slowdown effect

Vanilla.description: Does nothing special. Relies on the client not applying the slowness (server-side only). Minimal bypass.
Vanilla.behavior: No custom actions in any hook.

Post.description: Unblocks onPreMotion, then re-blocks onPostMotion to cancel the slowdown while keeping the server-side block state.
Post.onPreMotion: If holding sword and using item: send C07PacketPlayerDigging(RELEASE_USE_ITEM, BlockPos.ORIGIN, EnumFacing.UP)
Post.onPostMotion: If using item and holding sword: send C08PacketPlayerBlockPlacement(heldItem) to re-block

Alpha.description: Uses blink (packet queuing) to avoid sending the usage packets. Also applies movement input multiplier.
Alpha.onPreInput: If using item and moving: moveForward *= 0.2, moveStrafe *= 0.2, keyBindSprint.pressed = true
Alpha.onPreMotion: Stops blink on first tick when not using item anymore. Otherwise: starts blink (queues packets).
Alpha.note: Uses BlinkUtils to hide packets while using items

Beta.description: Rotates head 180 degrees away (yaw head = movement yaw + 180 - 45) while using items. Tricks anti-cheats that check head rotation vs item use.
Beta.onPreMotion: mc.thePlayer.rotationYawHead = RotationUtils.getMovementYaw() + 180 (minus 45 if not jumping while grounded), sets rotated=true
Beta.onPreUpdate: Sets Client.movefix = true to remap movement for the fake yaw
Beta.onPreInput: If using item and moving: moveForward *= 0.2, moveStrafe *= 0.2, keyBindSprint.pressed = true. If rotated: block jump.
Beta.onSprint: Forces sprinting if moving forward and not colliding horizontally

Gamma.description: Uses item swap trick with ground fake block placement on tick 1 to bypass slowdown. Also forces sprint.
Gamma.onPreMotion: When tick == 1 and NOT holding sword: send C09PacketHeldItemChange((current+1)%9), then C09PacketHeldItemChange(current), then C08PacketPlayerBlockPlacement(BlockPos(-1,-1,-1), ...).

NoGround.description: Disables NoFall spoofing while using items (prevents conflict between the two modules).

event_flow.onPreMotion: First updates display name. If not using item: reset tick/blinking. Otherwise: execute mode-specific logic, then tick++.
event_flow.onPostMotion: Only Post mode: re-block after movement.
event_flow.onPreInput: Alpha/Beta modes: apply movement multiplier and force sprint. Beta: suppress jump if rotated.

implementation_notes: The module extends the same abstract Module class as KillAura, with the same hook system.

The key mechanic is that while mc.thePlayer.isUsingItem() returns true, the player's movement is slowed server-side. Each bypass mode finds a way to either cancel the usage, hide it, or compensate for the slowdown.
Beta mode's head rotation uses the movement yaw calculation (which accounts for forward/strafe key inputs). The -45 offset is skipped when jumping to avoid flagging.
Gamma mode's tick==1 condition means it only fires on the second preMotion call while using an item (the first tick is reserved for detecting the item use start).
The display name shows the current mode as a suffix (e.g., 'NoSlow §7 Beta').
NoSlow is referenced by the KillAura Legit autoblock mode: if NoSlow is not toggled, Legit mode sets nextTick = -1 to enable the movement slow in its own onPreInput.
